name: recoil_app_attract_fmv_on_try_become_current
description: RecoilApp_AttractFmvState::OnTryBecomeCurrent refreshes FX surface state, captures the main window client rect, refreshes ATTRACT FMV actions when requested, stores the script HWND, starts loaded actions, and returns 1.
known_limits: The caller smoke verifies the surface, client-rect, reload-flag, script HWND, and return-value side effects with a live hidden window. Positive action loading and BeginAtTime behavior are covered by the listed zFMV script functional smokes.
VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through recoil_app_create_main_wnd; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the RecoilApp FMV state cluster.
